description: Baseline B - the fixed, candidate-INDEPENDENT 'standard practice' default panel order. Cardiac ion channels (hERG, Nav1.5, Cav1.2) front-loaded as real panels do; buried off-targets (5-HT2B, 5-HT3, CB1, MAO-A, AChE) sit low. This is the honest default we reorder against. Source: experiments/derisk/expanded/exp_score.py (BASELINE_B_ORDER) + FINDINGS.md.
